footer.quote: Normal people... believe that if it ain't broke, don't fix it. Engineers believe that if it ain't broke, it doesn't have enough features yet

profile.description1: Hi! I'm Daniel, a web developer. I'm focus in develop web pages and mobile application. I like discover new technologies and investigate how can a i solve problems with this new knowledge.
profile.description2: i am also try to expand to other areas like cybersecurity and videos games.

list.title: MoreParts Mod
list.content: This is a mod for the game Spacefligth Simulator. This Mod is one of the most downloaded mods in the game.

list.title: La Empresa
list.content: I participated in the Game Jam organized by CIDeV where the theme was dystopia. I collaborated with two other people who were looking for team and we created this 2.5D game

list.title: SFS Modloader
list.content: I created a simple mod loader for the game Spaceflight Simulator. This loader makes it easy for modders create and load their mods into game

list.title: Cumplimientool
list.content: Cumplimientool is a system that help to enterprise check their legal requirements, validate their cumpliment, legislation update monitoring and permission control.

list.title: Blacksmithmod
list.content: This is a mod for popular game Minecraft that i develop in my free time. This a simple blacksmith system in which the players can make somo shields y horse armours.
